{{Quote|Have you had the fried thakitillo appetizer at the bar? Delicious.|Leb Slesher, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Thakitillo''' was a delicacy which was considered among the finest edible fare in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

It consisted of tangy curds which dissolved in the eater's mouth. Members of the [[Myrkr strike team]] enjoyed it, though it prompted memories of fallen comrades.

Three opportunistic [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] trading material to the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] during the [[Swarm War]] asked [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to transport crates of green thakitillo, in return for assistance finding their daughter [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] in the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]/Killik war zone.
